name: Q-12 --summarize-by model aggregates per-model invocation count tokens per the P-10 tier-by-model rollup
command: for m in sonnet sonnet haiku; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/agent-invocations.sh" --append --subagent-id review --prompt-id p --prompt-version 1.0.0 --model $m --tokens-in 100 --tokens-out 50 --latency-ms 1000 --exit-code 0 2>/dev/null; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/agent-invocations.sh" --summarize-by model 2>out.txt && grep -q '\[sonnet\] invocations=2' out.txt && grep -q '\[haiku\] invocations=1' out.txt && echo summarized 1>&2
